# Agent harness docs — Context7 index
# Do NOT mirror full upstream docs here. Use ctx7 for live lookup.
# House policy (what we allow/deny) is in docs/TOOL_POLICY.md + config/tool-policy.json.

> Vendor reference for Claude, OpenCode, Cursor, Codex hook and permission schemas.

## Context7 library IDs

| Harness | Library ID | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Codex CLI + hooks | /websites/developers_openai_codex | hooks.json, PreToolUse, SessionStart |
| Codex (repo) | /openai/codex | Rust CLI source, deeper hook types |
| Cursor IDE + hooks | /websites/cursor | hooks v1, beforeShellExecution, beforeReadFile |
| Cursor CLI | /websites/cursor_cli | cursor-agent, permissions reference |
| OpenCode | /anomalyco/opencode | permission block, bash patterns, plugins |
| OpenCode (site) | /websites/opencode_ai | config reference |
| Claude Code | /websites/code_claude | settings.json, PreToolUse, permissions |

## Example ctx7 queries

```bash
ctx7 docs /websites/developers_openai_codex "hooks.json PreToolUse configuration schema"
ctx7 docs /websites/developers_openai_codex "PreToolUse permissionDecision deny hookSpecificOutput"
ctx7 docs /websites/cursor "hooks.json beforeShellExecution beforeReadFile preToolUse version 1"
ctx7 docs /websites/cursor "beforeShellExecution output permission deny agent_message"
ctx7 docs /websites/cursor "cli-config permissions allowlist Shell deny"
ctx7 docs /anomalyco/opencode "permission bash deny allow ask glob patterns"
ctx7 docs /anomalyco/opencode "permission read grep glob list deny"
ctx7 docs /websites/code_claude "PreToolUse hooks settings.json permissions deny"
```

## Official URLs (when ctx7 is unavailable)

- Codex hooks: https://developers.openai.com/codex/hooks
- Cursor hooks: https://cursor.com/docs/hooks
- Cursor CLI permissions: https://cursor.com/docs/cli/reference/permissions
- OpenCode permissions: https://opencode.ai/docs/permissions
- Claude Code hooks: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks

## House docs (NOT in ctx7 — read these for our machine)

- docs/TOOL_POLICY.md — architecture, testing tiers, harness matrix
- docs/PERMISSIONS.md — current allow/deny summary + test commands
- config/tool-policy.json — source of truth JSON
- agent-rules/TOOL_REGISTRY.md — agent-facing cheatsheet
- agent-rules/KNOWN_ISSUES.md — harness-specific caveats
